Class DRDimensionComponent

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRDimensionComponent
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIComponent, DRIDimensionComponent, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
DRCrosstab, DREllipse, DRFiller, DRGenericElement, DRHyperLinkComponent, DRLine, DRList, DRMap, DRMultiPageList, DRRectangle, DRSubreport, DRXyList
public abstract class DRDimensionComponent extends DRComponent implements DRIDimensionComponent

Abstract DRDimensionComponent class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
